title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Plunges 77% in Major Crypto Selloff - Market Cap Rank #223
excerpt: RaveDAO token experiences a devastating 77.54% decline in 24 hours, dropping to $0.537832 amid broader market turbulence. The decentralized autonomous organization focused on entertainment and events now sits at market cap rank #223 as investors reassess risk in the altcoin sector.
